scripts.format: bun run --cwd packages/cli format && bun run --cwd packages/ui format
scripts.format:fix: bun run --cwd packages/cli format:fix && bun run --cwd packages/ui format:fix
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd packages/cli lint && bun run --cwd packages/ui lint
scripts.lint:fix: bun run --cwd packages/cli lint:fix && bun run --cwd packages/ui lint:fix
scripts.precommit: bun run format:fix && bun run lint:fix && bun run format && bun run lint
